name: Mundo Novo

migrationPath.notes: Natural hybrid of Bourbon and Sumatra (Typica) found in Urupês

description: A natural hybrid of Bourbon and Sumatra (a Typica lineage variety), discovered in São Paulo state, Brazil in 1943. It is vigorous and highly productive, becoming one of the most planted varieties in Brazil. It served as a parent for Catuai. Despite being a hybrid of the two foundational lineages, it is disease-susceptible.
